title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMHealthcare
description: Healthcare facilities and services from OpenStreetMap tagged with healthcare=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMHealthcare

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

healthcareType.description: Property. The OSM healthcare tag classifying the facility. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:healthcare'

speciality.description: Property. Medical specialisation of the facility. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:healthcare:speciality'

operator.description: Property. The organization or branch of service operating the facility.

emergency.description: Property. Indicates if the facility has emergency services. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:emergency'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
